expectations.text: RICE table with Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort, Score, and Rank columns
expectations.evidence: Table present with all 6 columns: Item, Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort, RICE Score, Rank

expectations.text: All scoring assumptions are visible (not just numbers)
expectations.evidence: Detailed 'Scoring Assumptions' section before the table explains rationale for each item's Reach, Impact, Confidence, and Effort estimates

expectations.text: Strategic Override Test completed — SSO may be an override candidate given the $120K ARR deal dependency
expectations.evidence: Challenge 1 identifies SSO as strategic override with explicit reason: 'Enterprise deal dependency — two signed deals contingent on SSO' and $120K ARR documented

expectations.text: Data Gap Test identifies low-confidence items and recommends discovery spikes
expectations.evidence: Challenge 2 identifies API rate limiting (40%) and Mobile notifications (50%) as low-confidence. Recommends discovery spike for API rate limiting with specific approach (instrument API gateway for 2 weeks)

expectations.text: What Would We Regret test completed
expectations.evidence: Challenge 3 identifies Dashboard performance as regret-test winner and confirms alignment with RICE #1 ranking

expectations.text: EXPLICITLY NOT BUILDING list is present
expectations.evidence: Quarterly Priority Decision includes 'EXPLICITLY NOT BUILDING THIS QUARTER' section listing Bulk export and API rate limiting with rationales

expectations.text: Discovery spike recommended for any low-confidence, high-effort item
expectations.evidence: Discovery Spikes section recommends spike for API rate limiting with specific question to answer
